Hsi-Chen Dim Sum · Showtime Live Taichung Station Store

Xi Chen Dim Sum (Xi Chen Gang Shi Dian Xin Cha Can Ting - Showtime Live Taichung Station)

← Back to all restaurants
★★★★★ 4
📍 East District, Taichung📅 2026
Hong Kong HK Cafe Dim Sum Rice & Noodles
Xi Chen Hong Kong Dim Sum (喜辰港式點心茶餐廳) is the latest venture from the Chu Jian Dining Group, having landed right on the first floor of Showtime Live Taichung Station in late 2024. Being just a stone's throw from the Taichung Train Station, it's a super convenient spot to refuel after a shopping spree or a movie. The kitchen is led by Chef Huang Yi-ren—famously nicknamed the "Da Ren Ge" (a nod to a beloved, reliable character from a popular Taiwanese drama) of the dim sum world—who brings over 30 years of expertise to craft star-quality, handmade bites. The menu is packed with hits, like the signature Xi Chen Three-Flavor Siu Mai (steamed dumplings) that lets you sample three different flavors at once. Fans of the classic film *The God of Cookery* will definitely want to try the "Sorrowful Char Siu Rice," but you also can’t go wrong with their shrimp rice rolls with yellow chives, shrimp wonton noodles, or flaky Portuguese-style egg tarts. They’ve got all the *Cha Chaan Teng* (Hong Kong-style cafe) staples covered—the Beef Chow Fun is loaded with *wok hei* (that signature smoky aroma from a scorching hot wok), and the spam and egg noodles or steamed spare ribs with black bean sauce are pure comfort food. The vibe is sleek and modern, and while the space is cozy with limited seating, the 90-minute dining limit ensures things stay lively. It's a sister branch to their Dali location and a great addition to the local food scene. Perfect for commuters, post-movie hangouts, and dim sum lovers.
Good for Commuters Post-movie hangouts Dim sum lovers

House specialties

Xi Chen Trio Shumai (Three-Flavor Steamed Pork and Shrimp Dumplings, Xi Chen San Wei Shao Mai) "Sorrowful" BBQ Pork Rice (Honey-Glazed Char Siu with Fried Egg, Anran Cha Shao Fan) Shrimp and Yellow Chive Rice Noodle Rolls (Jiu Huang Xian Xia Chang Fen) Shrimp Wonton Noodle Soup (Xian Xia Yun Tun Mian) Portuguese Egg Tart (Pu Shi Dan Ta)

What I ordered

Beef Chow Fun (Stir-fried Rice Noodles with Beef, Gān Chǎo Niú Hé) Steamed Pork Ribs with Black Bean Sauce (Chǐ Zhī Zhēng Pái Gǔ) Steamed Beef Balls with Bean Curd Skin (Xiān Zhú Niú Ròu Qiú) Pan-fried Radish Cake (Hong Kong Style Turnip Cake, Jiān Luó Bo Gāo) Luncheon Meat and Egg Noodles (Spam and Egg Noodle Soup, Cān Dàn Miàn) Double-boiled Soup (Slow-simmered Soup in Individual Pots, Yuán Zhōng Dùn Tāng)

Dishes

Restaurant info

Address 1F, Showtime Living Taichung Station, No. 66, Nanjing Rd., East Dist., Taichung City 401, Taiwan Open in Google Maps →
Phone04-2211-9027
HoursWeekdays 11:00-14:00 / 17:00-22:00; weekends & holidays 11:00-22:00
ClosedOpen daily
ReservationsReservations accepted (線上 inline 訂位)
Service+10% service charge, 用餐90-minute time limit
PriceNT$ 300-500 / person
CuisineHong Kong・HK Cafe・Dim Sum・Rice & Noodles
